FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

You can schedule online, via our patient portal, or by calling the clinic. For urgent issues, please call us directly.

Bring a photo ID, your insurance card, a list of current medications, and any relevant medical records or referrals.

Yes — telehealth is available for many appointment types. Choose telehealth when booking or ask our staff for options.

Our main clinic is open Monday–Friday 8:00 AM–5:00 PM. We offer limited weekend or extended hours by appointment.

We accept most major insurers and offer self-pay options. Contact billing to confirm coverage for specific plans.

Request refills through the patient portal or contact your pharmacy. Allow at least 48 hours for processing.

Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before your appointment to avoid cancellation fees.

Submit a records release form or contact our medical records department. Processing typically takes up to 10 business days.

Yes — we accept electronic referrals and faxes. Please follow our referral guidelines available on the provider page.

We welcome research and clinical partnerships. Contact our partnerships team to discuss opportunities.

We periodically host training and CME events; subscribe to provider updates for announcements.

Contact our administrative office for contracting and credentialing procedures and required documentation.
Book Appointment

Schedule your visit with our specialists at a time that works best for you.

Find a Doctor

Browse our experienced doctors and choose the right specialist for your care.

Get in Touch

Get in touch with our clinic for inquiries, assistance, or emergency support.

Still have questions?

Get in touch with our team for personalized assistance.

Contact Us

"Professional staff and excellent care. The whole process was seamless."

Emily R.

San Jose, CA

"Quick appointments and attentive doctors. I highly recommend this clinic."

Mark D.

Phoenix, AZ

"State-of-the-art facilities and caring nurses. I felt very well taken care of."

Sara K.

Miami, FL
